zenithIncCodes.title: Zenith Inc Codes
zenithIncCodes.intro: Redeem codes help Zenith Inc players gain extra resources during their progression journey. Use these active codes to receive currency bonuses, temporary boosts, and helpful items that support upgrades and tower climbing.
zenithIncCodes.note: Codes are case-sensitive. Open the code redemption menu inside Zenith Inc, enter an active code, and confirm to claim your rewards instantly.

zenithIncBeginnerGuide.title: Zenith Inc Beginner Guide
zenithIncBeginnerGuide.intro: New players should focus on building a strong income foundation before pushing higher tower floors. Follow these beginner steps to understand upgrades, automation, and prestige progression in Zenith Inc.

steps.title: Earn Your First Coins
steps.description: Start by collecting basic income through active gameplay and early tower progression. Use your first coins to unlock stronger earning potential.

steps.title: Purchase Your First Upgrade
steps.description: Upgrade Click Power and income-related systems first to increase the speed of collecting resources and advancing.

steps.title: Unlock Auto Income
steps.description: Invest in automation upgrades to generate resources automatically while playing or staying away from the game.

steps.title: Climb Your First Tower Floors
steps.description: Use improved income and upgrades to unlock higher floors and reach new progression milestones.

steps.title: Complete Your First Prestige
steps.description: Reset progress through Prestige when available to gain permanent bonuses and accelerate future growth.

steps.title: Track Events and Updates
steps.description: Follow official Roblox updates and reward systems to discover new codes, events, and progression bonuses.

quickTips: Spend your first coins on income upgrades before anything else.
Unlock automation as early as possible to keep earning while away.
Prestige when progression slows down to gain permanent bonuses.
Redeem new codes regularly for free resources and boosts.

zenithIncProgressionGuide.title: Zenith Inc Progression Guide
zenithIncProgressionGuide.intro: Zenith Inc progression depends on improving resource generation, unlocking stronger upgrades, and using reset mechanics efficiently. These systems work together to help players reach higher tower levels.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Unlock automatic income systems that generate Coins over time and reduce the need for constant clicking.

items.title: Prestige
items.description: Reset selected progress to gain Prestige Points and permanent bonuses that improve future runs.

items.title: Multipliers
items.description: Increase overall earning efficiency through multiplier upgrades that boost resource production.

items.title: Rebirth
items.description: Use advanced reset mechanics to exchange progress for stronger permanent improvements.

items.title: Ascension
items.description: Reach higher progression stages that unlock powerful bonuses and advanced gameplay systems.

items.title: Higher Floors
items.description: Push tower progression forward to access new milestones, rewards, and stronger upgrade opportunities.

zenithIncUpgradeGuide.title: Zenith Inc Upgrade Guide
zenithIncUpgradeGuide.intro: Choosing the correct upgrade order helps players maximize income and reach higher tower floors faster. Focus on systems that improve long-term resource generation before cosmetic or minor improvements.

tiers.title: Auto Income
tiers.description: Provides continuous resource generation and improves AFK progression efficiency.

tiers.title: Multiplier
tiers.description: Boosts total earnings and increases the effectiveness of every other income source.

tiers.title: Click Power
tiers.description: Improves active gameplay income and helps early progression before automation is fully developed.

tiers.title: Offline Earnings
tiers.description: Improves progress while away from the game and supports long-term growth.

tiers.title: Capacity
tiers.description: Increases resource storage limits and reduces interruptions during progression.

tiers.title: Speed
tiers.description: Provides smaller efficiency improvements compared with major income upgrades.

zenithIncCurrencyGuide.title: Zenith Inc Currency Guide
zenithIncCurrencyGuide.intro: Zenith Inc uses multiple currencies to support its incremental progression system. Understanding each resource helps players upgrade efficiently, unlock higher floors, and maximize long-term growth.

currencies.title: Coins
currencies.usage: Basic upgrades such as click power, income boosts, and capacity improvements

currencies.title: Gems
currencies.usage: Powerful upgrades, boosts, and exclusive progression options

currencies.title: Prestige Points
currencies.usage: Unlock stronger multipliers and improve future growth speed

zenithIncTowerGuide.title: Zenith Inc Tower Guide
zenithIncTowerGuide.intro: The tower is the main progression path in Zenith Inc. Players climb through floors by improving income, unlocking upgrades, and reaching new milestones.

floors.title: Floor 1-10: Starting Levels
floors.description: The first floors introduce the core gameplay loop. Players earn Coins, purchase basic upgrades, and learn how clicking and automatic income work.

floors.title: Floor 50 Milestone
floors.description: Requires stronger upgrades and better income generation. Reaching this milestone unlocks access to more advanced progression opportunities and rewards.

floors.title: Floor 100 Milestone
floors.description: A major progression checkpoint requiring efficient upgrades and early Prestige usage. Rewards include improved progression speed and access to higher challenges.

floors.title: Floor 500 Milestone
floors.description: An advanced tower stage where automation and multipliers become essential. Players need optimized builds to continue climbing efficiently.

floors.title: Floor 1000 Milestone
floors.description: A late-game progression target requiring strong Prestige bonuses, upgraded systems, and long-term resource management.

floors.title: Final Floor
floors.description: The highest available tower milestone representing end-game progression. Players focus on maximum upgrades, efficiency, and future content.

zenithIncTipsAndTricks.title: Zenith Inc Tips and Tricks
zenithIncTipsAndTricks.intro: Smart upgrade choices and efficient resource management are important in incremental games. These tips help Zenith Inc players avoid slow progression and maximize growth.

tips.title: Optimize AFK Earnings
tips.description: Upgrade automatic income systems early and keep the game running when possible. AFK earnings provide consistent progress without constant clicking.

tips.title: Prioritize Important Upgrades
tips.description: Focus on upgrades that increase income generation first, especially multipliers and automation before cosmetic or minor improvements.

tips.title: Choose the Right Prestige Timing
tips.description: Prestige when progress slows down significantly. Resetting at the right moment provides permanent bonuses that accelerate future climbs.

tips.title: Manage Currencies Carefully
tips.description: Avoid spending rare currencies immediately. Save valuable resources for upgrades that provide long-term progression benefits.

tips.title: Complete Daily Rewards
tips.description: Check available daily tasks and reward systems regularly to collect additional resources and progression bonuses.

tips.title: Redeem Codes Regularly
tips.description: Watch for new Zenith Inc codes and redeem them quickly for free coins, gems, and temporary boosts.

zenithIncUpdates.title: Zenith Inc Updates
zenithIncUpdates.intro: This update tracker organizes important Zenith Inc changes, including progression improvements, new tower content, and quality-of-life improvements.

updates.title: Launch Release
updates.description: The initial release introduced the core incremental simulator experience with tower climbing, currencies, upgrades, and progression systems.

updates.title: Update 1.0
updates.description: Introduced early improvements to progression balance, additional upgrade options, and adjustments to the player growth experience.

updates.title: Update 2.0
updates.description: Expanded progression systems with new mechanics, stronger upgrades, and additional content for advanced players.

updates.title: New Floors Expansion
updates.description: Added more tower floors and progression milestones, giving players new climbing goals and additional rewards.

updates.title: Prestige System Improvements
updates.description: Improved Prestige mechanics with better rewards, smoother resets, and stronger long-term progression options.

updates.title: Quality of Life Improvements
updates.description: Added usability improvements, interface updates, and gameplay adjustments to make progression smoother.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Zenith Inc

questions.question: What is Zenith Inc?
questions.answer: Zenith Inc is a Roblox incremental tower simulator where players climb an endless tower, upgrade income systems, automate resources, and prestige for permanent growth.

questions.question: Where can I play Zenith Inc?
questions.answer: Zenith Inc is available on Roblox across web, mobile, and console platforms that support the Roblox app.

questions.question: How do I redeem Zenith Inc codes?
questions.answer: Open the code redemption menu inside Zenith Inc, enter an active code, and confirm to receive free coins, gems, and boosts instantly.

questions.question: What is Prestige in Zenith Inc?
questions.answer: Prestige is a reset mechanic that exchanges your current run for permanent bonuses and Prestige Points, accelerating every future climb in Zenith Inc.

questions.question: How do I climb the tower faster in Zenith Inc?
questions.answer: Focus on automation and multiplier upgrades first, prestige when progress slows, and redeem Zenith Inc codes regularly for free resources and boosts.

questions.question: Does Zenith Inc receive updates?
questions.answer: Yes. Zenith Inc continues to receive content updates that add new floors, upgrades, progression systems, and fresh redeem codes.

cta.title: Ready to Climb the Tower in Zenith Inc?
cta.description: Start your Zenith Inc journey on Roblox. Redeem codes, optimize upgrades, and prestige for infinite growth!

guide.whatIs: What is the Zenith Inc Guide?
guide.whatIsDescription: The Zenith Inc Guide walks you through the core incremental gameplay loop — earning currencies, buying upgrades, climbing the tower, and prestiging for faster growth. It covers everything a new player needs to understand the game's systems and start progressing efficiently from day one.

whySteps.step1Description: Learn how incremental earnings, upgrades, and prestige layers work together so every decision compounds your progress.
whySteps.step2Description: Follow the recommended early upgrade order to multiply your income quickly instead of wasting resources.
whySteps.step3Description: Apply tower progression tips to push through floors efficiently and unlock the next layer of content.

codes.whatIsDescription: Zenith Inc codes are free redeem strings released by the developers that grant bonuses like coins, gems, boosts, and exclusive items. New codes drop alongside updates, milestones, and community events, giving players a regular stream of free resources to accelerate their tower climb.

whySteps.step1Description: Every active code drops coins, gems, or boosts the moment you redeem it — a free head start with zero grinding.
whySteps.step2Description: Codes are tied to updates and events, so redeeming them keeps you in sync with the latest rewards.
whySteps.step3Description: Redeemed boosts and currency help new accounts push through the early tower floors much faster.

tier-list.whatIs: What is the Zenith Inc Tier List?
tier-list.whatIsDescription: The Zenith Inc Tier List ranks upgrades, automation modules, and progression strategies by their long-term value and efficiency. It helps you decide which upgrades to prioritize, which to skip, and which combinations produce the fastest growth so you can climb the tower and prestige with the best returns.

whySteps.step1Description: Focus your coins and gems on top-tier upgrades instead of wasting them on low-value options.
whySteps.step2Description: Combine high-ranked upgrades and modules into a proven strategy that multiplies your income.
whySteps.step3Description: Use tier-based guidance to decide when prestige and rebirth deliver the biggest permanent multiplier.

upgrades.title: Zenith Inc Upgrades
upgrades.description: Complete Zenith Inc upgrades guide covering every upgrade type, prestige and rebirth mechanics, automation, and AFK earnings.
upgrades.metaTitle: Zenith Inc Upgrades - Prestige, Rebirth & Automation
upgrades.metaDescription: Master every Zenith Inc upgrade system including prestige, rebirth, automation, and AFK earnings to maximize your permanent growth.
upgrades.whatIsDescription: Zenith Inc Upgrades are the core progression system — a layered set of boosts covering income multipliers, automation modules, prestige resets, and rebirth mechanics. Each layer compounds the last, so smart upgrade ordering and well-timed prestige cycles are the key to scaling your earnings exponentially.

whySteps.step1Description: Pick high-value income upgrades first so every coin you earn compounds into faster growth.
whySteps.step2Description: Unlock automation modules to keep earning coins and gems even while you are offline.
whySteps.step3Description: Time your prestige and rebirth cycles to bank permanent multipliers that accelerate every future run.

currency.whatIsDescription: Zenith Inc runs on a multi-layer currency system — starting with coins and gems and expanding into advanced resources unlocked as you progress. Each currency feeds a different upgrade layer, so understanding how to earn, farm, and convert them is essential to climbing the tower and funding prestige cycles.

whySteps.step1Description: Use proven farming methods to generate coins quickly and fund your core upgrades.
whySteps.step2Description: Reserve gems for high-impact upgrades and modules that multiply your long-term income.
whySteps.step3Description: Progress into advanced currencies and learn how to convert them for maximum upgrade value.

tower.whatIs: What is the Zenith Inc Tower?
tower.whatIsDescription: The Zenith Inc Tower is the central progression structure — a series of floors you climb by meeting income and upgrade milestones. Each floor unlocks new upgrades, currencies, and rewards, while milestone tiers grant permanent bonuses that carry across prestige cycles, making tower progression the backbone of long-term growth.

whySteps.step1Description: Pushing floors unlocks fresh upgrades, modules, and currencies that expand your progression options.
whySteps.step2Description: Reach milestone tiers on each floor to claim permanent bonuses that boost every future run.
whySteps.step3Description: Apply climbing strategies to break through difficult floors without wasting resources.

whySteps.step1Description: Updates and events regularly ship with fresh codes for free coins, gems, and boosts.
whySteps.step2Description: New upgrades, tower floors, and currencies change the meta — knowing them lets you adapt your strategy early.
